description: This pipeline applies an auto-thresholding algorithm to group incoming data based on annotations, and then performs a morphological hole filling operation on the resulting binary images, applying the filter to each 2D slice if higher-dimensional data is provided.

c1f918c3-b65a-4c08-ae32-7b57076c5e1a.name: ij1-morph-binary-fillholes2d
c1f918c3-b65a-4c08-ae32-7b57076c5e1a.description: Applies a morphological hole filling operation to binary images.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

e03cb9c5-1732-4db7-8205-29129f9a8234.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
e03cb9c5-1732-4db7-8205-29129f9a8234.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
